message:
test(manifest): add golden vector tests for sentry, kubernetes, airtable, spotify, hubspot, reddit, mongodb, gitlab, and dropbox

Validates each connector's manifest.toml parses correctly with expected
connector ID, complete operation set, and rate limit pool count. Ensures
manifest structural integrity is caught by CI before runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
